34577.zh_abstract: 本章研究了西班牙过去几十年间社会保障改革与老年劳动者不平等趋势。其主要目标是分析各项养老金改革对老年收入不平等的再分配影响。与1985年的规则相比，近期的养老金改革导致男性社会保障财富平均增加约18,000欧元，女性增加约15,000欧元。这分别代表了10%和8%的增长。这一效应主要由机械效应或直接效应（例如通过待遇调整）驱动，而退休概率的变化（次级效应或行为效应）接近于零。此外，我们发现男性和女性在不同收入四分位数之间存在显著差异。在这两种情况下，都存在明显的收入梯度，最富有的四分位数群体受益最多，男性和女性的增幅均接近20%，或超过50,000欧元。相反，对于男性中最贫困的四分位数群体以及女性中最贫困的两个四分位数群体，其变化接近于零，甚至略微为负。这很可能是由于最低待遇（它标志着该体系的慷慨程度，参见Boldrin等人，1999年）的影响，该待遇自动吸收了低收入个体的任何其他效应。

34576.title: Pension Reforms and Inequalities in France
34576.zh_title: 法国养老金改革与不平等
34576.authors: Antoine Bozio, Maxime Tô, Julie Tréguier
34576.abstract: This study analyzes the distributional effects of French pension reforms from 1993 to 2014 across different socioeconomic groups. Using administrative data for individuals born between 1934 and 1950, we examine the impact on social security wealth (SSW) across lifetime earnings deciles and genders. Our methodology incorporates differential life expectancy and exploits the PENSIPP model for counterfactual scenarios. Results show that reforms generally decreased SSW across all income groups, with regressive tendencies. The 1993 reform had the most significant impact, reducing SSW by over 15% for men in the lowest earnings decile compared to 5% for the highest. Subsequent reforms had milder effects. These findings contribute to understanding the long-term consequences of pension reforms on inequality and inform future policy decisions in countries facing similar demographic challenges.
34576.zh_abstract: 本研究分析了1993年至2014年间法国养老金改革对不同社会经济群体的分配效应。利用1934年至1950年间出生个体的行政数据，我们考察了这些改革对不同终身收入十分位数组和性别的社会保障财富的影响。我们的方法纳入了差异化的预期寿命，并利用PENSIPP模型进行反事实情景分析。结果显示，改革普遍降低了所有收入群体的社会保障财富，并呈现出累退趋势。1993年的改革影响最为显著，对于最低收入十分位数组的男性，社会保障财富减少了超过15%，而最高收入组仅减少了5%。后续改革的影响较为温和。这些发现有助于理解养老金改革对不平等的长期后果，并为面临类似人口挑战的国家未来的政策决策提供信息。

34575.title: Financializing the Professions: The Rise of Private Equity in Accounting
34575.zh_title: 职业的金融化：私募股权在会计行业的崛起
34575.abstract: Private equity (PE) has moved rapidly into professional services, yet its impact on accounting, where licensing regimes, reputational capital, and partnership governance traditionally limit external ownership, remains poorly understood. We examine how PE ownership alters the organization and market structure of accounting firms using data from 1999-2024 that link more than 3,600 PE transactions to detailed information on mergers and acquisitions (M&A), labor markets, and audit pricing. PE investment increases sharply after 2020 and extends to both CPA-licensed audit firms and non-CPA advisory practices, with most activity in large mid-tier PCAOB-registered firms. After PE entry, firms grow faster: non-audit revenues rise, employment expands, and cross-state M&A accelerates, consistent with platform-building and consolidation. These adjustments have market-level implications. PE investment raises labor-market concentration in key accounting occupations and drives up ERISA audit fees in a standardized setting, as confirmed by a synthetic difference-in-differences design. Our results reveal a key tension at the core of professions: preserving independence and competition in a market increasingly driven by financial capital.
34575.zh_abstract: 私募股权已迅速进入专业服务领域，然而，在会计行业，由于执业许可制度、声誉资本和合伙制治理传统上限制外部所有权，其影响仍鲜为人知。我们利用1999年至2024年的数据，将超过3,600笔私募股权交易与并购、劳动力市场和审计定价的详细信息联系起来，考察了私募股权所有权如何改变会计师事务所的组织和市场结构。私募股权投资在2020年后急剧增加，并扩展到持有注册会计师执照的审计事务所和非注册会计师咨询业务，其中大部分活动发生在大型中型市场PCAOB注册事务所。在私募股权进入后，事务所增长更快：非审计收入增加，就业扩大，跨州并购加速，这与平台建设和整合的趋势一致。这些调整具有市场层面的影响。正如合成双重差分设计所证实的，私募股权投资提高了关键会计职业的劳动力市场集中度，并在标准化环境中推高了ERISA审计费用。我们的结果揭示了职业核心的一个关键张力：在一个日益由金融资本驱动的市场中，如何维护独立性和竞争性。
34575.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE, LS, PR；JEL：G23, G34, J44, L2, L4, L84, M4, M41, M42

34574.title: Social Security Reforms and Inequality in Japan
34574.zh_title: 日本社会保障改革与不平等
34574.authors: Takashi Oshio, Satoshi Shimizutani, Akiko S. Oishi
34574.abstract: We examined the heterogeneous impacts of social security reforms in Japan over the past 40 years. We utilize a nationwide large-scale micro-dataset to compute individual-level social security wealth (SSW) and mortality rates by lifetime earning groups. We found that SSW declined for all groups after the social security reforms, which aimed to reduce generosity; however, the size of the negative impact was larger for richer individuals. These results indicate that a series of recent social security reforms have reduced inequality in SSW.
34574.zh_abstract: 我们考察了过去40年间日本社会保障改革的异质性影响。我们利用全国性大规模微观数据集，按终身收入群体计算了个人层面的社会保障财富和死亡率。我们发现，在旨在降低慷慨程度的社会保障改革之后，所有群体的社会保障财富均有所下降；然而，对较富裕个体的负面冲击幅度更大。这些结果表明，近期的一系列社会保障改革降低了社会保障财富的不平等。

34573.title: On Productivity and Distortions across Countries
34573.zh_title: 跨国生产率与扭曲研究
34573.abstract: I examine the empirical properties of firm-level productivity and distortions across countries using the newly released World Bank Enterprise Surveys (WBES). Using a standard framework of production heterogeneity, I show that the gap in productivity and distortions between high and low productivity firms is larger in developing countries, generating large aggregate productivity losses from misallocation. A key empirical property of distortions in developing countries is that they systematically weaken the relationship between firm size and firm productivity. I exploit a unique feature of the WBES data to document which specific aspects of the economic environment faced by firms, such as financial constraints, regulation, corruption, and weak infrastructure, are consistent with the empirical pattern of distortions across countries.
34573.zh_abstract: 我利用新发布的世界银行企业调查数据，考察了跨国企业层面生产率和扭曲的实证特征。使用一个标准的生产异质性框架，我表明，在发展中国家，高生产率企业与低生产率企业之间的生产率和扭曲差距更大，这导致了由资源错配引起的巨大总体生产率损失。发展中国家扭曲的一个关键实证特征是，它们系统地削弱了企业规模与企业生产率之间的关系。我利用世界银行企业调查数据的一个独特特征，记录了企业所面临经济环境的哪些具体方面（例如金融约束、监管、腐败和薄弱的基础设施）与跨国扭曲的实证模式相一致。

34572.title: Antitrust Enforcement in Labor Markets
34572.zh_title: 劳动力市场的反垄断执法
34572.abstract: Until recently, antitrust laws were rarely enforced in labor markets. Although the existence of labor market power has long been recognized, evidence only recently emerged that such market power regularly arises from sources that are actionable under antitrust law. Since 2010, antitrust agencies have substantially increased labor market enforcement actions. However, many questions relevant to enforcement remain unanswered, such as how to conduct market definition for labor markets, and how best to incorporate concentration into models of the labor market. This article reviews how antitrust is beginning to be used in labor markets, the evidence for and against its use, and the remaining evidence gaps standing in the way of more effective use.
34572.zh_abstract: 直到最近，反垄断法在劳动力市场中很少得到执行。尽管劳动力市场势力的存在早已被认识到，但直到最近才有证据表明，这种市场势力通常源于反垄断法可予追诉的源头。自2010年以来，反垄断机构大幅增加了劳动力市场的执法行动。然而，许多与执法相关的问题仍未得到解答，例如如何对劳动力市场进行市场界定，以及如何最好地将集中度纳入劳动力市场模型。本文回顾了反垄断如何开始在劳动力市场中被运用、支持及反对其运用的证据，以及阻碍其更有效运用的剩余证据缺口。

34571.title: Joint Child Custody and Interstate Migration
34571.zh_title: 共同子女监护权与州际迁移
34571.authors: Abi Adams, Oğuz Bayraktar, Thomas H. Jørgensen, Hamish Low, Alessandra Voena
34571.abstract: Joint custody following divorce is widespread, but implementation is costly when individuals live in different states and so affects interstate mobility. Migration of separated fathers has fallen significantly more than that of married fathers. We show the causal effect of joint custody using two strategies. First, we survey separated parents to elicit beliefs about the likelihood of interstate moves. Second, we use the staggered adoption of joint custody laws across US states, and show a reduction in actual migration of 11 percentage points for fathers. For mothers, there is no impact on mobility but suggestive evidence of beneficial labor market outcomes.
34571.zh_abstract: 离婚后的共同监护权很普遍，但当个人居住在不同州时，其执行成本高昂，因此会影响州际流动性。分居父亲的迁移率下降幅度显著大于已婚父亲。我们通过两种策略展示了共同监护权的因果效应。首先，我们调查了分居父母，以了解他们对州际迁移可能性的看法。其次，我们利用美国各州交错采用共同监护权法律的情况，并表明这导致父亲的实际迁移率下降了11个百分点。对于母亲而言，对流动性没有影响，但有提示性证据表明劳动力市场结果有所改善。

34570.title: Worker Preparedness Across the Marshallian Runs Survey Instruments and Early Evidence from the Copenhagen Life Panel
34570.zh_title: 马歇尔时期中的工人准备度：调查工具与哥本哈根生活面板的初步证据
34570.authors: Andrew Caplin, Søren Leth-Petersen, Victoria Gregory, Ida Maria Hartmann, Eungik Lee, Johan Sæverud
34570.abstract: Worker preparedness is a missing transmission channel in macroeconomics. Alfred Marshall’s taxonomy of short-, medium-, and long-run adjustment was developed to analyse how firms respond to shocks when different inputs can or cannot adjust. We extend this logic to workers by adding an element Marshall’s framework leaves implicit: anticipation. Preparedness refers to the buffers, search strategies, fallback plans, and retraining intentions individuals form before disruption occurs. These forward-looking margins shape both microeconomic outcomes and the effectiveness of macroeconomic policy. \nThe registry-linked Copenhagen Life Panel (CLP) provides a data architecture for making preparedness observable. By embedding belief and strategy elicitation within administrative records, the CLP makes it possible to test whether workers’ expectations and contingency plans are calibrated to the risks they face. Early evidence shows that short-run preparedness—liquidity, earnings-risk beliefs, and separation expectations—is measurable and predictive, and that miscalibration is a key source of vulnerability. \nThe broader agenda is to measure preparedness across Marshallian runs and across the worker life cycle. In the medium run, adjustment depends on search strategies and fallback planning; in the long run, retraining and occupational reorientation determine whether technological disruption becomes renewal or decline. We outline survey instruments for each run that can be integrated with registry data, transforming preparedness from conjecture into measurable and model-ready constructs.
34570.zh_abstract: 工人准备度是宏观经济学中一个缺失的传导渠道。阿尔弗雷德·马歇尔关于短期、中期和长期调整的分类法，最初是为了分析企业在不同投入要素能否调整时如何应对冲击而提出的。我们通过增加马歇尔框架中隐含的一个要素——预期——将这一逻辑扩展到工人身上。准备度指的是个体在冲击发生之前形成的缓冲、搜索策略、备用计划和再培训意图。这些前瞻性边际既影响微观经济结果，也影响宏观经济政策的有效性。与登记数据关联的哥本哈根生活面板（CLP）提供了一种使准备度可观测的数据架构。通过在行政记录中嵌入信念和策略的引出，CLP使得检验工人的预期和应急计划是否与其面临的风险相匹配成为可能。初步证据表明，短期准备度——流动性、收入风险信念和离职预期——是可测量且具有预测性的，并且校准失误是脆弱性的一个关键来源。更广泛的议程是测量马歇尔时期以及工人整个生命周期中的准备度。在中期，调整取决于搜索策略和备用计划；在长期，再培训和职业重新定位决定了技术冲击是带来复兴还是衰退。我们为每个时期概述了可与登记数据整合的调查工具，将准备度从推测转变为可测量且可建模的构念。

34569.title: The State Pension Age and Inequality in Old-age Social Security Wealth in the Netherlands
34569.zh_title: 荷兰的国家养老金领取年龄与老年社会保障财富不平等
34569.abstract: Since the early 2010s, the state pension age (SPA) is one of the main public policy instruments in the Netherlands for inducing people to postpone retirement. The SPA has gradually increased from 65 years in 2012 to 66 years and 4 months in 2021. In the context of the Dutch old-age social security system, an increase in the SPA is hypothesized to decrease the retirement probability and to increase inequality in pension benefits entitlements. Empirical support for the two hypotheses is found with data on individuals aged 55–69 over the period 2011-2021. Inequality in old-age social security wealth has increased after 2015 for non-retirees. However, the findings do not support that this increase is because of the SPA increase.
34569.zh_abstract: 自2010年代初以来，国家养老金领取年龄（SPA）是荷兰诱导人们推迟退休的主要公共政策工具之一。SPA已从2012年的65岁逐步提高到2021年的66岁零4个月。在荷兰老年社会保障体系的背景下，SPA的提高被假设会降低退休概率并增加养老金福利权利的不平等。利用2011-2021年期间55-69岁个体的数据，我们找到了支持这两个假设的经验证据。对于非退休人员，老年社会保障财富的不平等在2015年之后有所增加。然而，研究结果并不支持这种增加是由于SPA提高所致。

34568.title: Lenin's Shadow on the Istanbul Convention: The Legacy of Communism on Attitudes Toward Violence Against Women in Europe
34568.zh_title: 列宁在《伊斯坦布尔公约》上的阴影：共产主义遗产对欧洲针对妇女暴力态度的影响
34568.abstract: The Istanbul Convention is an international treaty aimed at protecting women against violence. We employ survey datasets and investigate its effect on attitudes toward violence against women in Europe. Using difference-in-differences models we compare individuals in countries that signed and ratified the Convention with those in countries that signed but either never ratified or did so after the surveys were fielded. Entry into the Convention significantly reduced the likelihood that lower-educated individuals view violence against women as acceptable, but only in countries outside the former Eastern Bloc. In former Eastern Bloc countries, the Convention affected attitudes only among younger less-educated individuals who had limited exposure to communism—those who were no older than teenagers when the Soviet Union collapsed in 1990. We show that younger cohorts in these countries tend to hold more individualistic and less pro-government attitudes and express greater trust in the courts and the justice system than older individuals. Finally, we find no effect of the Convention on attitudes toward other forms of norm-violating behavior, such as tax evasion, bribery, fare evasion, or drug use. These results indicate that the Convention had a targeted impact, and that its influence on shaping preferences depends on the broader cultural context which is itself shaped by institutions.
34568.zh_abstract: 《伊斯坦布尔公约》是一项旨在保护妇女免受暴力侵害的国际条约。我们利用调查数据集，研究其对欧洲针对妇女暴力态度的影响。使用双重差分模型，我们比较了签署并批准该公约国家的个体与签署但从未批准或在调查实施后才批准国家的个体。公约的生效显著降低了受教育程度较低的个体认为针对妇女暴力可接受的可能性，但这仅在前东欧集团以外的国家成立。在前东欧集团国家，公约仅影响了那些接触共产主义有限的年轻低学历个体——即1990年苏联解体时年龄不超过青少年的群体。我们表明，这些国家的年轻一代比年长个体持有更个人主义、更少亲政府的态度，并对法院和司法系统表现出更大的信任。最后，我们发现公约对其他形式的违规行为（如逃税、贿赂、逃票或吸毒）的态度没有影响。这些结果表明，公约产生了有针对性的影响，并且其对偏好塑造的作用取决于更广泛的文化背景，而文化背景本身又由制度塑造。
34568.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：K40, K42, P0, Z18

34567.title: Examining the Effect of Cannabis Legalization on Youth Cannabis Use: Evidence on the Importance of Enforcing Retailer Compliance
34567.zh_title: 检验大麻合法化对青少年大麻使用的影响：执行零售商合规重要性的证据
34567.authors: Rahi Abouk, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula
34567.abstract: Studies show that U.S. state cannabis legalization has increased adult cannabis use, but the effects on youth use are mixed. This study considers whether omission of enforcement of the minimum legal sales age (MLSA) might help explain prior mixed findings. We combine biennial survey data for 6th, 8th, 10th, and 12th grade students from the 2010-2023 Washington Healthy Youth Survey with administrative data on premise and compliance checks from the Washington State Liquor and Cannabis Board (WSLCB). Premise checks educate retailers on any potential violations but do not involve penalties or fines. Compliance checks, on the other hand, involve increasing penalties imposed on retailers if they are found to be noncompliant with sales to minors. We use difference-in-differences (DID) methods that are robust to a staggered policy rollout with dynamic and heterogeneous treatment effects and assess impacts of both types of inspections on past month cannabis use. We conduct a series of sensitivity and robustness checks of the impact of both types of inspections based on student’s grade, length of time since inspection, inclusion of alcohol/tobacco retail compliance checks, and alternative measures of cannabis use. Our research suggests that the implementation of regular random compliance checks with stiff penalties on retailers for noncompliance may help reduce the influence of legal markets on youth use. Unobserved heterogeneity within and across states in the enforcement of MLSAs may contribute to mixed findings of the impact of legalization on youth cannabis use.
34567.zh_abstract: 研究表明，美国各州的大麻合法化增加了成年人的大麻使用，但对青少年使用的影响结果不一。本研究考虑，对最低法定销售年龄（MLSA）执行的遗漏是否有助于解释先前不一致的发现。我们将2010-2023年华盛顿健康青年调查中六年级、八年级、十年级和十二年级学生的两年一次调查数据，与华盛顿州酒类与大麻委员会（WSLCB）关于场所检查和合规检查的行政数据相结合。场所检查旨在教育零售商注意任何潜在违规行为，但不涉及处罚或罚款。相比之下，合规检查则涉及对被发现向未成年人销售不合规的零售商施加递增的处罚。我们使用对交错政策推行具有稳健性、能处理动态和异质性处理效应的双重差分（DID）方法，评估两种检查类型对过去一个月大麻使用的影响。我们基于学生年级、检查后时间长度、是否包含酒精/烟草零售合规检查以及大麻使用的替代测量指标，对两种检查的影响进行了一系列敏感性和稳健性检验。我们的研究表明，实施定期随机合规检查并对不合规零售商处以严厉处罚，可能有助于减少合法市场对青少年使用的影响。各州内部和之间在MLSA执行上的未观测异质性，可能导致关于合法化对青少年大麻使用影响的研究结果不一。

34566.title: Electoral Margins and Political Competition
34566.abstract: In this paper, we argue that recent trends in party seat margins and election vote margins result from structural changes in the nature of US political competition. We assemble a comprehensive database of electoral results for the House, Senate and presidential contests, from the 19th century until today. Seat margins declined in the recent period, so the margins of control of the House, Senate, and Electoral College by either party have become smaller. However, this was not accompanied by a decline in the margins of victory at the constituency level. We propose a model of electoral competition with multiple districts that can rationalize these trends. We show theoretically that an increase in politicians’ information about voter preferences, together with the growing nationalization of politics, can account for the decrease in seat margins and the concurrent stability in vote margins. As implied by the model, we document that campaign contributions received by House and Senate candidates are increasingly concentrated in a dwindling set of swing constituencies.
34566.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们认为近期政党席位优势率和选举投票优势率的趋势源于美国政治竞争性质的结构性变化。我们汇编了一个从19世纪至今的众议院、参议院和总统选举结果的综合数据库。近期席位优势率有所下降，因此任一政党控制众议院、参议院和选举人团的优势幅度变得更小。然而，这并未伴随着选区层面胜利优势率的下降。我们提出了一个包含多个选区的选举竞争模型，可以解释这些趋势。我们从理论上证明，政治家关于选民偏好信息的增加，加上政治日益全国化，可以解释席位优势率的下降以及投票优势率的同时稳定。正如模型所暗示的，我们记录到，众议院和参议院候选人获得的竞选捐款日益集中在数量不断减少的摇摆选区。

34565.title: The Effect of Online Sales Bans on E-Cigarette Use
34565.zh_title: 在线销售禁令对电子烟使用的影响
34565.authors: Ege Aksu, Charles J. Courtemanche, Dhaval M. Dave, Daniel L. Dench, Michael Grossman, Jooyoung Kim, Selen Ozdogan, Shubhsri Rajendra, Joseph J. Sabia, Henry Saffer
34565.abstract: Policymakers at the state and federal levels have argued that restricting online sales of e-cigarettes is a crucial policy tool to curb youth vaping. This study is the first to explore the effectiveness of statewide restrictions on online sales of electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) on teen and young adult ENDS use. Using data from four national datasets (Monitoring the Future, State and Combined Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance System surveys, Population Assessment of Tobacco and Health, and Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System survey) and a generalized difference-in-differences approach, we find no evidence that such laws are effective at curbing youth ENDS use. With 95 percent confidence, we can rule out that online sales restrictions reduced prior-month ENDS use by more than 3.6 percent of the pre-treatment mean vaping rate. An exploration of mechanisms suggests that (1) while restrictions on online sales may have a small negative effect on online purchases, youths are able to substitute to other sources for ENDS products to compensate for reduced online access, and (2) online sources are a very rare source of e-cigarettes for youths. Finally, we also find no evidence that online sales restrictions reduce adult ENDS use.
34565.zh_abstract: 州和联邦层面的政策制定者认为，限制电子烟在线销售是遏制青少年吸电子烟的关键政策工具。本研究首次探讨全州范围内限制电子尼古丁传送系统（ENDS）在线销售对青少年和年轻人ENDS使用的影响。利用四个全国性数据集（《监测未来》、州和综合青少年风险行为监测系统调查、烟草与健康人口评估以及行为风险因素监测系统调查）的数据，并采用广义双重差分方法，我们没有发现此类法律能有效遏制青少年ENDS使用的证据。在95%的置信水平下，我们可以排除在线销售限制将过去一个月ENDS使用率降低超过预处理均值吸烟率3.6%的可能性。对机制的探索表明：（1）虽然在线销售限制可能对在线购买产生微小的负面影响，但青少年能够转向其他ENDS产品来源以补偿在线渠道的减少；（2）在线来源是青少年获取电子烟极为罕见的渠道。最后，我们也没有发现在线销售限制能减少成年人ENDS使用的证据。

34564.title: Round Bidding in Auctions
34564.authors: Mark van Oldeniel, Christopher M. Snyder, Adriaan R. Soetevent
34564.abstract: Our analysis of novel data from hundreds of thousands of online auctions on a large platform operating in the Netherlands uncovers a tendency to bid round numbers. Round winning bids are higher than average for a given item and are eschewed by bidders as they gain experience. These findings lead us to hypothesize that, rather than delivering a strategic benefit (say, adding salience to a jump bid), round bidding is a symptom of a behavioral bias. We construct a structural model of behavioral bidding in auctions, estimated for each of a subsample of the most frequently auctioned items. Our median estimate is that 21% of bidders are prone to round-number bias, reducing their expected surplus by nearly 10%.
34564.zh_abstract: 我们对来自荷兰一个大型平台上数十万场在线拍卖的新数据进行分析，发现了一种倾向于报出整数价格的趋势。对于给定物品，整数获胜出价高于平均水平，并且随着竞拍者获得经验，他们会避免使用整数出价。这些发现使我们假设，整数报价并非带来战略利益（例如，增加跳跃出价的显著性），而是行为偏差的症状。我们构建了一个拍卖中行为出价的结构模型，并对最常拍卖物品子样本中的每一个进行了估计。我们的中位数估计是，21%的竞拍者容易受到整数偏差的影响，这使他们的预期剩余减少了近10%。

34563.title: Monthly Earnings Volatility and Household Pooling
34563.zh_title: 月度收入波动与家庭收入汇集
34563.authors: Martin E. Andresen, Andreas R. Kostøl, Ross T. Milton, Corina Mommaerts, Luisa Wallossek
34563.abstract: This paper examines monthly earnings volatility and its transmission to household earnings volatility using Norwegian data on the universe of monthly pay histories. We document substantial month-to-month earnings changes: within a job, while over one-quarter of months have no earnings changes, another quarter have at least a 23% change. Accounting for multiple jobs and non-employment increases volatility, while aggregating to households reduces volatility by 12-35%. Event studies around job loss and couple formation, along with decomposition and bounding exercises, show that most of this decline reflects pooling effects rather than sorting or responses to shocks.
34563.zh_abstract: 本文利用挪威涵盖所有月度工资历史的月度数据，考察了月度收入波动及其向家庭收入波动的传导。我们记录了显著的月度收入变化：在一份工作内部，虽然超过四分之一的月份没有收入变化，但另有四分之一的月份变化至少达到23%。考虑多份工作和非就业状态会增加波动性，而汇总到家庭层面则使波动性降低12-35%。围绕失业和伴侣形成的事件研究，以及分解和边界分析表明，这种下降大部分反映了汇集效应，而非分类或对冲击的反应。

34562.title: Learning to Work Towards Goals: A Sequential Evaluation of the Effect of a Goal-Setting Course on Academic and Soft Skills
34562.zh_title: 学会为目标而工作：目标设定课程对学业与非认知技能影响的序贯评估
34562.authors: Anaya Dam, Guthrie Gray-Lobe, Michael Kremer, Joost de Laat, Karlijn Morsink
34562.abstract: This study sequentially evaluates a soft-skills course implemented in Ugandan and Kenyan primary schools that replaced academic review time with lessons on goal-setting and related skills as students prepared for high-stakes primary school-leaving exams. An exploratory evaluation in Uganda provided evidence of positive impacts on girls’ test scores. A confirmatory evaluation in Kenya found that the course led to improvements in self-reported soft skills, especially among girls, although no gains in test scores. The study illustrates the utility of sequential evaluation, with exploratory analysis to identify promising hypotheses, followed by out-of-sample testing, as a tool to uncover heterogeneous effects.
34562.zh_abstract: 本研究对乌干达和肯尼亚小学实施的一门软技能课程进行了序贯评估。该课程在学生备考高利害的小学毕业考试期间，用目标设定及相关技能的教学取代了学业复习时间。在乌干达进行的探索性评估提供了该课程对女生考试成绩产生积极影响的证据。在肯尼亚进行的验证性评估发现，该课程改善了学生自我报告的软技能，尤其是女生，但考试成绩未见提升。本研究展示了序贯评估的效用：先通过探索性分析识别有前景的假设，再进行样本外检验，以此作为揭示异质性效应的工具。
34562.meta: Programs：DEV, ED；JEL：C18, C93, D91, I20, I21, I24, I25

34561.title: The Role of Insurers in Health Care Spending and Production: Evidence from Utah
34561.zh_title: 保险公司在医疗支出与生产中的作用：来自犹他州的证据
34561.authors: Benjamin R. Handel, Jonathan A. Holmes, Jonathan T. Kolstad, Kurt J. Lavetti
34561.abstract: Private health insurers play a central role in determining the cost and quantity of health care in the United States. Despite this centrality, there has been limited empirical work studying how insurers differentially affect spending and consumption, especially for expensive and pervasive chronic conditions. We use hundreds of natural experiments involving employers switching their primary health insurer, together with a movers design, to estimate these causal effects. We find meaningful differences in total cost and prices for medical and pharmaceutical spending. Within-person changes in spending caused by forced reassignment across pairs of insurers, holding fixed plan generosity, are as large as 30% of total medical spending and 37% of drug spending. We also find substantial dispersion in insurer causal effects on health care spending and quantities for patients with diabetes, hypertension, and other chronic conditions. We find strong evidence for drug offsets as insurers who causally increase drug utilization also reduce medical costs and quantities overall and by condition. Finally, we find that employers do not select plans that reduce costs for their employees based on the match between employee conditions and estimated plan treatment effects, leaving significant cost savings on the table.
34561.zh_abstract: 私人健康保险公司在美国决定医疗成本与数量方面扮演核心角色。尽管如此，关于保险公司如何差异化影响医疗支出与消费的实证研究仍然有限，尤其是针对昂贵且普遍的慢性病。我们利用涉及雇主更换其主要健康保险公司的数百个自然实验，结合迁移者设计，来估计这些因果效应。我们发现，在医疗和药品支出的总成本与价格上存在显著差异。在保持计划慷慨度不变的情况下，因被迫在保险公司对之间重新分配而导致的个人支出变化，高达总医疗支出的30%和药品支出的37%。我们还发现，对于糖尿病、高血压及其他慢性病患者，保险公司对医疗支出和数量的因果效应存在显著离散性。我们找到了强有力的药物抵消效应证据：那些因果性地增加药物使用的保险公司，同时也降低了总体及按病种划分的医疗成本和数量。最后，我们发现雇主并未根据员工病情与估计的计划处理效应之间的匹配度来选择降低员工成本的计划，从而错失了显著的成本节约机会。

34560.title: In-situ Upgrading or Population Relocation? Direct Impacts and Spatial Spillovers of Slum Renewal Policies
34560.zh_title: 就地升级还是人口迁移？贫民窟更新政策的直接影响与空间溢出效应
34560.authors: Paul Gertler, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro, Raimundo Undurraga, Joaquin A. Urrego
34560.abstract: Slums are widely viewed as disadvantaged areas characterized by substandard housing and negative neighborhood spillovers that constrain local economic development. Governments typically respond with one of two place-based interventions: (a) in-situ upgrading that improves infrastructure and housing conditions within existing settlements, or (b) relocation of slum households to formal housing elsewhere in the city, freeing valuable urban land for alternative uses. We compare the direct effects and local spatial spillovers of these two approaches in Chile. We construct a 20-year national panel of slum polygons that integrates satellite imagery, census microdata, construction permits, administrative records, crime reports, and property-tax data. Using this dataset, we estimate how each policy affects the physical characteristics of slums and adjacent areas, and whether either intervention shifts the socioeconomic composition of residents. Our empirical strategy relies on Synthetic Difference-in-Differences for causal identification. We find that both policies reduce the share of land devoted to housing within the original slum perimeter — in-situ upgrading by reallocating land toward neighborhood infrastructure, and population relocation by reducing the number of slum households and housing structures. However, only in-situ upgrading generates durable improvements in housing quality and the socioeconomic status of residents. In addition, upgrading produces substantial positive spillovers in nearby neighborhoods, increasing formal housing investment and reducing crime. Moreover, administrative cost data show that in-situ upgrading is roughly one-third less expensive per household than population relocation, underscoring its greater cost-effectiveness.
34560.zh_abstract: 贫民窟通常被视为条件不利的区域，其特点是住房不达标以及负面的邻里溢出效应，制约了地方经济发展。政府通常采取两种基于地点的干预措施之一：（a）就地升级，即改善现有定居点内的基础设施和住房条件；或（b）将贫民窟家庭迁移至城市其他地区的正规住房，从而释放宝贵的城市土地用于其他用途。我们比较了智利这两种方法的直接效应和局部空间溢出效应。我们构建了一个覆盖20年的全国贫民窟多边形面板数据，整合了卫星图像、人口普查微观数据、建筑许可证、行政记录、犯罪报告和房产税数据。利用这一数据集，我们估计了每项政策如何影响贫民窟及其周边地区的物理特征，以及任一干预措施是否改变了居民的社会经济构成。我们的实证策略采用合成双重差分法进行因果识别。我们发现，两种政策都减少了原始贫民窟边界内用于住房的土地比例——就地升级通过将土地重新分配给邻里基础设施，而人口迁移则通过减少贫民窟家庭数量和住房结构。然而，只有就地升级带来了居民住房质量和社会经济状况的持久改善。此外，升级在邻近社区产生了显著的正向溢出效应，增加了正规住房投资并减少了犯罪。而且，行政成本数据显示，就地升级每户的成本大约比人口迁移低三分之一，凸显了其更高的成本效益。

34559.title: Experiencing Carbon Pricing
34559.authors: Stefano Carattini, Ian Fletcher, Chad W. Kendall, Michael K. Price, Arthur Vu
34559.abstract: Many socially desirable policies are not implemented because of their ex-ante unpopularity, but this unpopularity may be overcome through experience with the policy. In this paper, we examine how opposition to carbon pricing in the state of Washington turned into support after voters experienced a cap-and-trade policy with revenues earmarked for environmental purposes – "cap-and-invest." Analyzing voting behavior at the census block group level, we observe that support varies by political affiliation as expected, but experience consistently increases support across the board. Using a proprietary survey, we further show that the increase in support among voters in Washington state is specific to the cap-and invest policy they experienced; support for carbon pricing or climate policies more generally remained unchanged.
34559.zh_abstract: 许多社会期望的政策因其事前不受欢迎而未能实施，但这种不受欢迎可能通过政策体验得以克服。在本文中，我们研究了华盛顿州的选民在体验了将收入专项用于环境目的的限额与交易政策（即“限额与投资”）后，对碳定价的反对如何转变为支持。通过分析人口普查区块组层面的投票行为，我们观察到支持度按预期因政治派别而异，但体验一致地全面提高了支持度。利用一项专有调查，我们进一步表明，华盛顿州选民支持度的增加是专门针对他们所体验的限额与投资政策的；对碳定价或气候政策的总体支持度保持不变。

34558.title: Anatomy of US Inequality
34558.abstract: Is income inequality in the United States primarily driven by disparities between ethnic groups or within them? The evidence reveals a striking pattern: 96% of U.S. income inequality arises from variation within groups sharing common ancestral origins, far overshadowing the comparatively small share attributable to differences between these groups. This pattern remains remarkably stable across time and regions.
34558.zh_abstract: 美国的收入不平等主要是由族群之间的差异还是族群内部的差异驱动的？证据揭示了一个显著的模式：美国收入不平等的96%源于具有共同祖先起源的群体内部的差异，这远远超过了可归因于这些群体之间差异的较小份额。这一模式在时间和地区上保持惊人的稳定。

34557.title: Impacts of Contemporaneous Air Pollution Exposure on Cognitive Performance in Kenya
34557.zh_title: 同期空气污染暴露对肯尼亚认知表现的影响
34557.authors: Xuqian Ma, Michelle N. Layvant, Edward Miguel, Eric Ochieng, Ajay Pillarisetti, Michael W. Walker
34557.abstract: We estimate the short-term cognitive effects of fine particulate matter (PM2.5) exposure using highly time-resolved, individual-level data collected during cognitive testing in Kenya. By linking real-time portable monitor readings to Harmonized Cognitive Assessment Protocol (HCAP) scores, we identify acute impacts of pollution on general and domain-specific cognition. Higher PM2.5 exposure during testing is associated with lower cognitive performance, particularly in memory, executive function, and visuospatial tasks. Nonlinear models suggest threshold effects, with larger declines at higher exposure levels. Notably, effects are significantly larger among more educated individuals, possibly due to greater task demands or lower chronic exposure that limits physiological adaptation. Given that cognitive impairment is evident even at PM2.5 levels below Kenya’s annual regulatory threshold of 35 μg/m³, the findings suggest that short-term exposure may impose underappreciated human capital costs that current regulatory standards fail to mitigate. The results highlight the potential cognitive and economic returns to interventions that reduce air pollution exposures in low-resource settings.
34557.zh_abstract: 我们利用在肯尼亚认知测试期间收集的高时间分辨率个体层面数据，估计了细颗粒物（PM2.5）暴露的短期认知效应。通过将实时便携式监测仪读数与协调认知评估协议（HCAP）得分相关联，我们识别了污染对一般认知和特定领域认知的急性影响。测试期间较高的PM2.5暴露与较低的认知表现相关，尤其是在记忆、执行功能和视觉空间任务方面。非线性模型提示存在阈值效应，在较高暴露水平下认知下降更大。值得注意的是，在受教育程度较高的个体中，效应显著更大，这可能是由于更高的任务要求或较低的慢性暴露限制了生理适应。鉴于即使在低于肯尼亚年度监管阈值35 μg/m³的PM2.5水平下也能观察到认知损伤，这些发现表明，短期暴露可能造成当前监管标准未能缓解的、被低估的人力资本成本。结果凸显了在资源匮乏环境中减少空气污染暴露的干预措施可能带来的认知和经济回报。

34556.title: The Labor Market and Health Impacts of Reducing Cesarean Section Deliveries
34556.zh_title: 减少剖宫产分娩对劳动力市场与健康的影响
34556.authors: Sarah Miller, Petra Persson, Maya Rossin-Slater, Laura R. Wherry
34556.abstract: We study an intervention that reduced cesarean deliveries among low-risk first-time mothers, using California birth records linked to earnings data. Exposed mothers were 8% less likely to have a c-section, with no adverse health effects. We find suggestive evidence that they were more likely to return to their pre-birth employer and had higher within-firm earnings rankings in the quarter post-birth. These labor market gains fade over time. However, mothers who had a second child were less likely to have a c-section or preterm delivery, suggesting our estimated effects from avoiding a first c-section may be lower bounds on total gains.
34556.zh_abstract: 我们利用与收入数据相关联的加利福尼亚州出生记录，研究了一项减少低风险初产妇剖宫产分娩的干预措施。受干预的产妇接受剖宫产的可能性降低了8%，且未观察到不良健康影响。我们发现有提示性证据表明，她们更有可能在产后季度回到产前雇主工作，并在公司内的收入排名更高。这些劳动力市场收益随时间消退。然而，生育第二个孩子的母亲接受剖宫产或早产的可能性更低，这表明我们估计的避免首次剖宫产的效应可能是总收益的下限。

34555.title: Default and Interest Rate Shocks: Renegotiation Matters
34555.zh_title: 违约与利率冲击：重新谈判的重要性
34555.authors: Victor Almeida, Carlos Esquivel, Timothy J. Kehoe, Juan Pablo Nicolini
34555.abstract: We develop a sovereign default model with debt renegotiation in which interest-rate shocks affect default incentives through two mechanisms. Under the standard mechanism, higher interest rates tighten the government’s budget constraint. Under the renegotiation mechanism, higher rates increase lenders’ opportunity cost of holding delinquent debt, which makes lenders accept larger haircuts and makes default more attractive for the government. We argue that our novel renegotiation mechanism reconciles standard sovereign default models with the narrative that the sharp increase in the real interest rate in the United States was a relevant factor in the defaults of the early 1980s.
34555.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含债务重新谈判的主权违约模型，其中利率冲击通过两种机制影响违约激励。在标准机制下，更高的利率收紧政府的预算约束。在重新谈判机制下，更高的利率增加了贷款人持有违约债务的机会成本，这使得贷款人接受更大的减记，并使违约对政府更具吸引力。我们认为，我们提出的新颖的重新谈判机制，使得标准的主权违约模型与以下叙事相协调：美国实际利率的急剧上升是20世纪80年代初违约的一个相关因素。

34554.title: Overlapping Policy Interventions: Evidence from Home Health
34554.zh_title: 重叠政策干预：来自家庭医疗的证据
34554.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Yunan Ji, Neale Mahoney
34554.abstract: Governments often concurrently deploy multiple policy instruments to tackle a common objective, yet researchers typically analyze each policy's impacts independently. We study interactions across policies and their implications within the context of efforts to reduce Medicare-financed home health services. We consider two geographically targeted policies: strike force prosecutions of suspected fraud and moratoria on the entry of new home health agencies. Depending on location and time, we observe either both, one, or neither policy in place. Individually, each policy reduced home health use substantially, and was well-targeted to places with higher treatment effects. Although we estimate only a modest interaction between the two policies, we find that optimally allocating them across the areas that received at least one policy could have increased their total impact by about 20% relative to the observed placement. Our exercise highlights the potential gains from coordination across different policy instruments pursuing similar objectives.
34554.zh_abstract: 政府经常同时部署多种政策工具以实现共同目标，然而研究者通常独立分析每项政策的影响。我们研究了政策之间的相互作用及其在减少医疗保险资助的家庭医疗服务背景下的影响。我们考虑了两项地理针对性政策：针对疑似欺诈的特别工作组起诉，以及对新家庭医疗机构进入的暂停令。根据地点和时间的不同，我们观察到两项政策同时实施、仅实施一项或均未实施的情况。单独来看，每项政策都大幅减少了家庭医疗的使用，并且精准地针对了治疗效果更高的地区。尽管我们估计这两项政策之间的相互作用不大，但我们发现，在至少接受了一项政策的地区之间优化分配这些政策，相对于实际部署，可能使其总影响增加约20%。我们的研究强调了追求相似目标的不同政策工具之间协调的潜在收益。

34553.title: Explaining the Widening Divides in US Midlife Mortality: Is There a Smoking Gun?
34553.zh_title: 解释美国中年死亡率日益扩大的鸿沟：是否存在确凿证据？
34553.authors: Christopher L. Foote, Ellen Meara, Jonathan S. Skinner, Luke R. Stewart
34553.abstract: The education-mortality gradient has increased sharply in the last three decades, with the life-expectancy gap between people with and without a college degree widening from 2.6 years in 1992 to 6.3 years in 2019 (Case and Deaton 2023). During the same period, mortality inequality across counties rose 30 percent, accompanied by an increasing rural health penalty. Using county- and state-level data from the 1992–2019 period, we demonstrate that these three trends arose due to a fundamental shift in the geographic patterns of mortality among college and non-college populations. First, we find a sharp decline in both mortality rates and geographic inequality for college graduates. Second, the reverse was true for people without a college degree; spatial inequality became amplified. Third, we find that rates of smoking play a key role in explaining all three empirical puzzles, with secondary roles attributed to income, other health behaviors, and state policies. Less well-understood is why “place effects” matter so much for smoking (and mortality) for those without a college degree.
34553.zh_abstract: 过去三十年间，教育-死亡率梯度急剧上升，拥有大学学位与未拥有大学学位人群之间的预期寿命差距从1992年的2.6年扩大到2019年的6.3年（Case and Deaton 2023）。同期，各县之间的死亡率不平等上升了30%，同时伴随着农村健康劣势的加剧。利用1992-2019年期间的县和州级数据，我们证明这三个趋势源于大学和非大学人群中死亡率地理模式的根本性转变。首先，我们发现大学毕业生的死亡率水平和地理不平等均急剧下降。其次，未拥有大学学位的人群情况相反；空间不平等被放大。第三，我们发现吸烟率在解释所有三个实证难题中起着关键作用，次要作用归因于收入、其他健康行为以及州政策。不太被理解的是，为什么“地方效应”对未拥有大学学位人群的吸烟（和死亡率）如此重要。

34552.title: Long-run Effects of Universal Pre-Primary Education Expansion: Evidence from Argentina
34552.zh_title: 普及学前教育扩张的长期效应：来自阿根廷的证据
34552.authors: Samuel Berlinski, Guillermo Cruces, Sebastian Galiani, Paul Gertler, Fabian Gonzalez
34552.abstract: We study the long-run effects of a large public expansion of pre-primary education in Argentina. Between 1993 and 1999 the federal government financed the construction of new preschool classrooms targeted to departments with low base- line enrollment and high poverty, creating roughly 186,000 additional places. We link administrative records on classroom construction to four population censuses and estimate difference-in-differences models that compare treated and untreated cohorts across high- and low-construction departments. An additional preschool seat per child increases post-kindergarten schooling by about 0.5 years, raising the probability of completing secondary school by 11.9 percentage points and of enrolling in post-secondary education by 7.1 percentage points. For women, access to the program also reduces completed fertility: an additional seat lowers the number of live births per woman by 0.18, and we find no evidence that selective migration biases these estimates. We find little impact on labor-market outcomes at the census date, consistent with beneficiaries still being in school or in the early stages of their careers. A benefit-cost analysis based on the estimated schooling gains, standard Mincer returns, and observed construction and operating costs yields a benefit-cost ratio of about 11 and an internal rate of return of 13%. Our findings show that universal at-scale pre-primary expansions in middle-income countries can generate sizable improvements in human capital and demographic outcomes at relatively low fiscal cost.
34552.zh_abstract: 我们研究了阿根廷大规模公共学前教育扩张的长期效应。1993年至1999年间，联邦政府资助新建了针对基线入学率低且贫困程度高的地区的学前教室，创造了约186,000个额外名额。我们将教室建设的行政记录与四次人口普查数据相关联，并估计了双重差分模型，比较了高建设密度和低建设密度部门中受处理队列与未受处理队列的情况。每个儿童每增加一个学前名额，会使幼儿园后的受教育年限增加约0.5年，使完成中学教育的概率提高11.9个百分点，接受高等教育的概率提高7.1个百分点。对于女性而言，该项目的可及性也降低了已完成生育率：每增加一个名额，每位女性的活产数减少0.18，并且我们没有发现选择性迁移会偏误这些估计的证据。我们在普查日期发现对劳动力市场结果影响甚微，这与受益者仍在求学或处于职业生涯早期阶段的情况一致。基于估计的教育收益、标准明瑟回报率以及观察到的建设和运营成本进行的成本效益分析得出，效益成本比约为11，内部收益率为13%。我们的研究结果表明，中等收入国家大规模普及的学前教育扩张能够以相对较低的财政成本，在人力资本和人口结果方面产生显著改善。

34551.title: Fiscal Policy: Financing and Indebtedness
34551.authors: Jing Cynthia Wu, Shihan Xie, Yinxi Xie, Ji Zhang
34551.abstract: We conduct a large-scale information randomized controlled trial to study fiscal policy impacts. Surveying approximately 9,000 households across five eurozone countries with varying debt-to-GDP ratios enables a clean cross-country comparison. The key finding is that the fiscal multiplier depends jointly on the financing method and the country’s debt burden: multipliers are smaller in high-debt countries when debt-financed but remain similar across countries when tax-financed. Finally, we develop a New Keynesian model featuring fiscal discipline, which reproduces the empirical patterns observed in the survey and highlights their underlying economic mechanisms.
34551.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项大规模信息随机对照试验来研究财政政策的影响。调查了五个债务与GDP比率各异的欧元区国家约9,000个家庭，从而实现了清晰的跨国比较。关键发现是，财政乘数同时取决于融资方式和国家的债务负担：在高债务国家，当通过债务融资时乘数较小，但当通过税收融资时，各国之间的乘数相似。最后，我们构建了一个具有财政纪律的新凯恩斯模型，该模型再现了调查中观察到的实证模式，并突出了其背后的经济机制。
34551.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C83, D84, E62, H60

34550.title: Harvesting Differences-in-Differences and Event-Study Evidence
34550.zh_title: 收获双重差分与事件研究证据
34550.authors: Alberto Abadie, Joshua Angrist, Brigham Frandsen, Jörn-Steffen Pischke
34550.abstract: This paper surveys econometric innovations related to differences-in-differences estimators and to event-study models with time-varying treatment effects. Our discussion highlights tricky normalization issues, heterogeneous policy effects, the interpretation of exposure designs, pretrends pretesting, and the ever-bothersome question of logs versus levels. Key ideas are illustrated with applications.
34550.zh_abstract: 本文综述了与双重差分估计量以及具有时变处理效应的事件研究模型相关的计量经济学创新。我们的讨论强调了棘手的标准化问题、异质性政策效应、暴露设计的解释、事前趋势预检验，以及一直令人困扰的对数与水平问题。关键思想通过应用实例加以说明。
34550.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL, TWP；JEL：C23, C5

34549.title: Division of Labor in the Global Economy
34549.zh_title: 全球经济中的劳动分工
34549.authors: Sascha O. Becker, Hartmut Egger, Michael Koch, Marc-Andreas Muendler
34549.abstract: This paper links globalization, worker efficiency, and wage inequality within plants to internal labor market organization. Using German plant-worker data and information on the task content of occupations, we document that larger plants (i) use more occupations, (ii) assign fewer tasks per occupation, and (iii) exhibit greater wage dispersion. We develop a model where plants endogenously bundle tasks into occupations, improving worker-task matching at the cost of higher fixed span-of-control costs. Embedding this into a Melitz framework, we show that trade increases worker efficiency and wage inequality in exporting plants, whereas non-exporting plants experience the opposite effects. Structural estimation and simulations confirm the model’s predictions and point to non-monotonic economy-wide effects.
34549.zh_abstract: 本文将全球化、工人效率以及工厂内部的工资不平等与内部劳动力市场组织联系起来。利用德国工厂-工人数据和关于职业任务内容的信息，我们记录了大型工厂（i）使用更多职业，（ii）每个职业分配的任务更少，以及（iii）表现出更大的工资离散度。我们构建了一个模型，其中工厂内生地将任务捆绑成职业，改善了工人-任务匹配，但代价是更高的固定管理跨度成本。将此嵌入Melitz框架后，我们表明贸易提高了出口工厂的工人效率和工资不平等，而非出口工厂则经历了相反的影响。结构估计和模拟证实了模型的预测，并指出了非单调的总体经济效应。

34548.title: The Consequences of Abortion Funding Bans
34548.authors: Lauren Hoehn-Velasco, Nikita Dhingra, Mayra Pineda-Torres
34548.abstract: Do restrictions on public funding create unintended reliance on social assistance? In this paper, we study the 1976 Hyde Amendment, which barred federal funding for abortion. Using county-level data and an event-study design, we show that reduced federal funding for abortion increased fertility among young women by 2%. These effects were concentrated among non-white women, who subsequently experienced greater welfare participation in states with larger abortion funding declines. The consequences extend into the next generation: non-white girls born after Hyde were more likely to rely on public assistance in adulthood. Abortion funding restrictions reinforce long-run economic inequality across generations.
34548.zh_abstract: 公共资金限制是否会造成对社会救助的非预期依赖？在本文中，我们研究了1976年海德修正案，该修正案禁止联邦资金用于堕胎。利用县级数据和事件研究设计，我们表明联邦堕胎资金减少使年轻女性的生育率增加了2%。这些影响集中在非白人女性中，她们随后在堕胎资金下降幅度较大的州经历了更高的福利参与率。其后果延续到了下一代：海德修正案后出生的非白人女孩在成年后更有可能依赖公共援助。堕胎资金限制强化了代际间的长期经济不平等。
34548.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH；JEL：D6, H51, H53, I13, I18, J13

34599.title: An Evaluation of Biases in Wellbeing Estimates Using Interviewers Versus Online Data Collection in the Global Flourishing Study
34599.zh_title: 使用访谈员与在线数据收集的幸福估计偏差评估：基于全球繁荣研究
34599.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson, Alan J. Cui
34599.abstract: Survey mode is a critical consideration in well-being research using the 22 country Global Flourishing Study (GFS). We find marked differences in responses to well-being questions if they are obtained via a telephone interviewer (CATI) or online (CAWI). In fifteen countries in the GFS both survey modes are used. In seven of the most advanced countries, only CAWI is used. Well-being responses are markedly different across survey modes within countries using both modes and compared to countries only using CAWI. On average, CATI tends to produce higher well-being scores. Failure to account for these sampling differences biases results. This is the case in twenty-three prior studies that used the GFS and took no account of survey mode. We examine each of these studies and show the findings differ by survey mode. Combined with the presence of other unobservable country-level confounders, the differences between survey modes substantively weakens the internal validity of cross-country comparisons and random effects meta-analysis conducted with the GFS.
34599.zh_abstract: 调查模式是使用22国全球繁荣研究进行幸福研究时的一个关键考虑因素。我们发现，通过电话访谈员或在线方式获得的幸福问题回答存在显著差异。在全球繁荣研究的15个国家中，两种调查模式都被使用。在七个最先进的国家中，仅使用在线方式。在使用两种模式的国家内部以及相对于仅使用在线方式的国家，幸福回答存在显著差异。平均而言，电话访谈员倾向于产生更高的幸福得分。未能考虑这些抽样差异会导致结果偏差。这在先前使用全球繁荣研究但未考虑调查模式的23项研究中就是如此。我们检查了这些研究中的每一项，并显示结果因调查模式而异。结合其他不可观测的国家层面混杂因素的存在，调查模式之间的差异实质上削弱了使用全球繁荣研究进行的跨国比较和随机效应元分析的内部有效性。

34598.title: Rebuilding Ukraine's Cities: Maximizing Benefits and Minimizing Costs
34598.zh_title: 重建乌克兰城市：最大化收益与最小化成本
34598.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Martina Kirchberger, Andrii Parkhomenko
34598.abstract: This paper discusses the rebuilding of Ukrainian cities. We start by outlining key facts about Ukraine and its cities: (i) the country’s population is declining; (ii) there is a shift in demand for housing from east to west; (iii) Kyiv’s advantage is growing; (iv) house prices are rising in Kyiv and western cities, (v) Ukraine’s cities are slow and congested. We then present a theoretical framework for maximizing the benefits of Ukraine’s rebuilding effort to highlight the welfare effects of different allocations of post-war infrastructure. Finally, we consider the cost curve for reconstruction, as determined, in particular, by the cost of materials, labor, the industrial organization of the building industry and public practices in procurement and regulation. We highlight three broad strategies for shifting the cost curve: openness, standardization and investing-in-investing. We conclude by outlining areas for future research.
34598.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了乌克兰城市的重建。我们首先概述了乌克兰及其城市的关键事实：（i）国家人口正在下降；（ii）住房需求从东部向西部转移；（iii）基辅的优势正在增长；（iv）基辅和西部城市的房价正在上涨；（v）乌克兰城市缓慢且拥堵。然后，我们提出了一个最大化乌克兰重建努力收益的理论框架，以强调战后基础设施不同配置的福利效应。最后，我们考虑了重建的成本曲线，该曲线尤其由材料成本、劳动力、建筑业的产业组织以及公共采购和监管实践决定。我们强调了三种转变成本曲线的广泛策略：开放性、标准化和投资于投资。最后，我们概述了未来研究的领域。

34597.title: Sources of Evidence for Evidence-based Policymaking: Journals, Articles and Scholarly Structures in the Economic Report of the President 2010-2025
34597.zh_title: 循证决策的证据来源：2010-2025年总统经济报告中的期刊、文章与学术结构
34597.abstract: How does academic research inform presidential economic policy? This paper investigates the sources of evidence in the Economic Report of the President from 2010 to 2025. We construct a novel dataset of 4,140 unique references cited across the Obama, Trump, and Biden administrations to map the evidence base used by the Council of Economic Advisers. Our analysis shows that peer-reviewed articles, comprising 66.62% of all these references, are heavily concentrated in top-tier economics journals. While the specific articles cited change with policy priorities, the hierarchy of journals remains moderately stable across years and administrations. A co-author network analysis reveals a scholarly landscape of distinct intellectual camps. Crucially, a small number of high-centrality scholars act as brokers, connecting these disparate research communities. Together, our findings illuminate the social structure of evidence-based policymaking, demonstrating how journal hierarchies and scholarly networks shape the flow of economic knowledge to the White House.
34597.zh_abstract: 学术研究如何影响总统经济政策？本文调查了2010年至2025年总统经济报告中的证据来源。我们构建了一个包含奥巴马、特朗普和拜登政府引用的4140个独特参考文献的新数据集，以描绘经济顾问委员会使用的证据基础。我们的分析表明，同行评审文章占所有这些参考文献的66.62%，高度集中在顶级经济学期刊中。虽然具体引用的文章随政策优先事项而变化，但期刊的层级在不同年份和政府间保持适度稳定。共同作者网络分析揭示了一个由不同学术阵营组成的学术格局。至关重要的是，少数高中心性的学者充当经纪人，连接这些不同的研究社区。总之，我们的发现阐明了循证决策的社会结构，展示了期刊层级和学术网络如何塑造经济知识流向白宫。
34597.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EEE, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：A11, H11, I38, J08, N01

34596.title: From RANK to HANK, without FIRE
34596.authors: George-Marios Angeletos, Joao Guerreiro, Dalton Rongxuan Zhang
34596.abstract: We offer guidance and tools for augmenting macroeconomic models with a realistic friction in expectations and for quantifying its implications. We start by distilling the common essence of a few popular alternatives to FIRE (Full Information Rational Expectations), including noisy or sticky information, rational or behavioral inattention, level-k thinking and cognitive discounting. We then develop a new specification, which captures the same essence while maximizing tractability. We show how this works in both RANK (the Representative-Agent New Keynesian model) and HANK (Heterogeneous-Agent New Keynesian models). We further clarify the separate partial- and general-equilibrium effects of informational frictions or bounded rationality; emphasize the interaction of such frictions with the Intertemporal Keynesian Cross and other forms of strategic complementarity; review concrete lessons for business cycles and macroeconomic policy; and discuss how to discipline the theory with appropriate survey evidence.
34596.zh_abstract: 我们提供了在宏观经济模型中引入现实预期摩擦并量化其影响的指导和工具。我们首先提炼了FIRE的几个流行替代方案的共同本质，包括噪声或粘性信息、理性或行为不注意、层级思维和认知折扣。然后，我们开发了一种新的设定，它在最大化可处理性的同时捕捉了相同的本质。我们展示了这在RANK和HANK中如何运作。我们进一步澄清了信息摩擦或有限理性的单独局部均衡和一般均衡效应；强调了此类摩擦与跨期凯恩斯交叉及其他形式的战略互补性的相互作用；回顾了关于商业周期和宏观经济政策的具体教训；并讨论了如何用适当的调查证据来约束理论。

34595.title: Volatile Rates, Fragile Growth: Global Financial Risk and Productivity Dynamics
34595.zh_title: 波动率与脆弱增长：全球金融风险与生产率动态
34595.authors: Nils Gornemann, Eugenio I. Rojas, Felipe Saffie
34595.abstract: Does global financial risk affect long-run growth? Using a panel state-space model for emerging and advanced small open economies, we measure the effects of U.S. monetary policy uncertainty shocks. A one-standard-deviation shock lowers the level of the stochastic trend in emerging markets by at least 25 basis points after three years, with little effect in advanced economies. A small open economy model with growth through innovation and occasionally binding borrowing constraints explains this heterogeneity: higher interest-rate volatility depresses valuations, tightens collateral constraints, and slows innovation in equilibrium. A novel interaction between the occasionally binding constraint and stochastic volatility is key for our results.
34595.zh_abstract: 全球金融风险是否影响长期增长？我们利用新兴经济体和发达小型开放经济体的面板状态空间模型，衡量了美国货币政策不确定性冲击的影响。一个标准差的正向冲击会使新兴市场随机趋势水平在三年后下降至少25个基点，而对发达经济体的影响很小。一个包含通过创新实现增长和偶尔具有约束力的借贷约束的小型开放经济体模型解释了这种异质性：更高的利率波动率压低估值、收紧抵押品约束，并在均衡中减缓创新。偶尔具有约束力的约束与随机波动率之间的新颖相互作用是我们结果的关键。
34595.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, PR；JEL：F32, F41, G15, O16

34594.title: The Rise of Specialized Financial Products
34594.zh_title: 专业化金融产品的兴起
34594.authors: Ana Babus, Matias Marzani, Sara Moreira
34594.abstract: The variety of financial products available for firms to raise funds has expanded rapidly in recent decades. This paper studies the role of innovations that introduce specialized financial products using a combination of granular data and a parsimonious model of security issuance. We present three key findings. First, differential product adoption across firms explains most of the observed variation in the amounts of funds raised. Second, firms that adopt new products are more successful in raising funds. Third, the funds raised from new financial products are often sourced from numerous highly specialized products, each used by only a few firms.
34594.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，企业可用于筹集资金的金融产品种类迅速扩大。本文结合细粒度数据和一个简洁的证券发行模型，研究了引入专业化金融产品的创新所起的作用。我们提出了三个关键发现。首先，不同企业对产品的差异化采用解释了所观察到的筹集资金数额的大部分变化。其次，采用新产品的企业在筹集资金方面更为成功。第三，从新金融产品中筹集的资金通常来自众多高度专业化的产品，每种产品仅被少数企业使用。

34593.title: Generous Long-Term Contracts
34593.abstract: I argue that in long-term consumer–producer relationships, menus of contracts can be advantageously replaced by a single generous contract such that, at any point in time, the sum of a consumer’s transfers is equal to the sum of transfers they would have made under the contract that is the best for them in hindsight. Such generous long-term contracts can increase skeptical consumers’ demand for complex and higher-powered contracts while approximately implementing the same outcomes as the underlying menu evaluated by a rational decision maker. Applications include voluntary load shedding in retail electricity markets and cost sharing in health insurance.
34593.zh_abstract: 我认为，在长期的消费者-生产者关系中，合同菜单可以被一个单一的慷慨合同所替代，使得在任何时间点，消费者的转移支付总和等于他们在事后看来对自己最有利的合同下本应做出的转移支付总和。这种慷慨的长期合同可以增加持怀疑态度的消费者对复杂且激励更强的合同的需求，同时近似实现与由理性决策者评估的底层菜单相同的结果。应用包括零售电力市场的自愿减负荷和健康保险中的成本分摊。
34593.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EEE, EH, IO, PE；JEL：D47, D82, D86, I13, Q41

34592.title: Patents to Products: Product Innovation and Firm Dynamics
34592.zh_title: 从专利到产品：产品创新与企业动态
34592.authors: David Argente, Salomé Baslandze, Douglas Hanley, Sara Moreira
34592.abstract: We match patents to products using natural language methods applied to detailed product descriptions and patent texts in the consumer goods sector. While more than half of product innovations originate from non-patenting firms, patent filings are on average followed by subsequent product introductions. Yet this relationship weakens with firm size. Patents held by market leaders also yield revenue premiums beyond what can be explained by their own product introductions and are associated with stronger deterrence of competitors’ innovations. To interpret these findings, we develop a simple growth model in which larger firms have stronger incentives to engage in strategic patenting—filing for protection rather than market innovation—which dampens innovation and slows creative destruction.
34592.zh_abstract: 我们使用自然语言方法，将消费品行业的详细产品描述和专利文本进行匹配，从而将专利与产品联系起来。尽管超过一半的产品创新来自非专利企业，但专利申请平均而言会随后带来产品推出。然而，这种关系随着企业规模增大而减弱。市场领导者持有的专利还能带来超出其自身产品推出所能解释的收入溢价，并且与对竞争对手创新的更强威慑力相关。为了解释这些发现，我们开发了一个简单的增长模型，其中大型企业有更强的动机进行战略性专利申请——即为了寻求保护而非市场创新——这会抑制创新并减缓创造性破坏。

34591.title: Multidimensional Sorting: Comparative Statics
34591.zh_title: 多维分类：比较静态分析
34591.authors: Job Boerma, Andrea Ottolini, Aleh Tsyvinski
34591.abstract: In sorting literature, comparative statics for multidimensional assignment models with general output functions and input distributions is an important open question. We provide a complete theory of comparative statics for technological change in general multidimensional assignment models. Our main result is that any technological change is uniquely decomposed into two distinct components. The first component (gradient) gives a characterization of changes in marginal earnings through a Poisson equation. The second component (divergence-free) gives a characterization of labor reallocation. For U.S. data, we quantify equilibrium responses in sorting and earnings with respect to cognitive skill-biased technological change.
34591.zh_abstract: 在分类文献中，针对具有一般产出函数和投入分布的多维分配模型的比较静态分析是一个重要的未解决问题。我们为一般多维分配模型中技术变革的比较静态分析提供了一个完整的理论。我们的主要结果是，任何技术变革都可以唯一地分解为两个不同的组成部分。第一个组成部分（梯度）通过泊松方程刻画了边际收益的变化特征。第二个组成部分（无散度）刻画了劳动力重新配置的特征。针对美国数据，我们量化了分类和收益相对于认知技能偏向型技术变革的均衡响应。

34590.title: School Board Capacity
34590.authors: Barbara Biasi, Minseon Park, John D. Singleton, Seth D. Zimmerman
34590.abstract: School boards have statutory authority over most K–12 policies, but longstanding concerns about members’ limited expertise and weak incentives raise questions about their ability to drive policy. Using new data on board members’ priorities and actions, combined with a regression discontinuity design that provides quasi-random variation in board composition, we show that board members have large effects on district outcomes across many policy domains. On average, electing a member aligned with a given priority shifts related outcomes by 0.21 standard deviations in the expected direction. Directly observing policy priorities, rather than weakly correlated demographic or professional proxies, is crucial for understanding board capacity.
34590.zh_abstract: 学校董事会对大多数K-12政策拥有法定权力，但长期以来对其成员专业知识有限和激励不足的担忧，引发了对其推动政策能力的质疑。利用关于董事会成员优先事项和行动的新数据，结合提供董事会组成准随机变化的断点回归设计，我们表明董事会成员在多个政策领域对学区结果产生巨大影响。平均而言，选举一位与特定优先事项一致的成员，会使相关结果朝预期方向变动0.21个标准差。直接观察政策优先事项，而非弱相关的 demographics 或职业代理变量，对于理解董事会能力至关重要。

34589.title: Understanding the Employment Effects of Opportunity Zones
34589.zh_title: 理解机会区的就业效应
34589.authors: Matthew Freedman, Noah Arman Kouchekinia, David Neumark
34589.abstract: The Opportunity Zone program was designed to encourage investment in distressed communities across the United States. Early research found no evidence of impacts of the program on employment, earnings, or poverty of zone residents, but some evidence of positive effects on employment among businesses in zones. Using the latest survey-based as well as administrative data, we adopt a longer-run and more comprehensive perspective on the labor market impacts of OZs. We find that OZ designation increases job creation among businesses within zones. However, a large share of the newly created jobs in zones is offset by declines in nearby low-income communities. While we detect gains in OZ resident employment over the longer run, the increase comes from jobs with workplaces outside of OZs that, in light of the changing demographic composition of zones, are likely held by new as opposed to existing residents. Overall, our results suggest that OZs have limited benefits for existing residents of targeted areas and are associated mainly with a spatial reallocation of jobs and households.
34589.zh_abstract: 机会区计划旨在鼓励对美国各地困境社区的投资。早期研究发现，没有证据表明该计划对区内居民的就业、收入或贫困产生影响，但有一些证据表明对区内企业的就业有积极影响。利用最新的基于调查的数据和行政数据，我们采用更长期、更全面的视角来审视机会区的劳动力市场影响。我们发现，机会区指定增加了区内企业的就业创造。然而，区内新创造就业岗位的很大一部分被附近低收入社区的就业下降所抵消。虽然我们在长期内检测到机会区居民就业的增长，但这种增长来自工作场所在机会区之外的岗位，并且考虑到区内人口构成的变化，这些岗位很可能由新居民而非现有居民获得。总体而言，我们的结果表明，机会区对目标地区现有居民的益处有限，并且主要与就业和家庭的空间重新配置有关。

34587.title: How Good is International Risk Sharing? Stepping Outside the Shadow of the Welfare Theorems
34587.zh_title: 国际风险分担有多好？走出福利定理的阴影
34587.authors: Mark A. Aguiar, Oleg Itskhoki, Dmitry Mukhin
34587.abstract: We revisit whether global output is (Pareto) efficiently distributed across countries over time. The efficient allocation of goods across regions requires that the relative marginal utilities of consumption across countries comoves with the relative costs of the country-specific consumption bundles. Standard approaches to evaluating this property exploit the Welfare Theorems and equate the observed real exchange rate with the social relative costs of consumption. Given the large literature documenting the disconnect between exchange rates, relative prices faced by consumers in a given market, and relative quantities consumed, we develop a methodology that measures relative costs that is robust to this disconnect. We find that relative consumption growth across regions is significantly more correlated with our computed shadow prices than it is with observed real exchange rates, suggesting an allocation closer to efficient risk sharing. Moreover, we provide a decentralization that matches observed prices and quantities, enabling us to rationalize the better implied risk sharing with the failure of the standard correlations. The decentralization involves a combination of segmented foreign exchange markets and pricing-to-market behavior in goods markets. The model implies that consumption allocations are insulated from excess fluctuations in the exchange rate via the equilibrium pricing behavior of exporters.
34587.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视全球产出是否在时间上（帕累托）有效地在国家间分配。商品在地区间的有效分配要求各国消费的相对边际效用与各国特定消费篮子的相对成本共同变动。评估这一性质的标准方法利用福利定理，将观察到的实际汇率等同于消费的社会相对成本。鉴于大量文献记录了汇率、消费者在特定市场面临相对价格以及相对消费量之间的脱节，我们开发了一种衡量相对成本的方法，该方法对这种脱节具有稳健性。我们发现，各地区间的相对消费增长与我们计算的影子价格的相关性显著高于与观察到的实际汇率的相关性，这表明分配更接近有效的风险分担。此外，我们提供了一个与观察到的价格和数量相匹配的分散化方案，使我们能够用标准相关性的失效来解释更好的隐含风险分担。该分散化方案涉及分割的外汇市场和商品市场的按市场定价行为的结合。该模型意味着，通过出口商的均衡定价行为，消费分配得以免受汇率过度波动的影响。

34586.title: The Cost of State-Building: Evidence from Germany
34586.zh_title: 国家建设的代价：来自德国的证据
34586.abstract: I examine the potential of pro-development state (capacity) building projects to be co-opted for repression. I leverage the natural experiment created by the differential build-up of capacity between formerly Prussian and formerly non-Prussian parts of unified Germany, and the radical policy shifts instigated by the Nazi regime. Across a geographical discontinuity, and across different collection points of the same transport to the East, I find that Prussian municipalities were significantly more efficient at deporting German Jews. They were also better at providing public goods and at collecting taxes. Just before the Nazis came to power, Prussian municipalities also provided public goods more efficiently, but were not differentially anti-Semitic. I show that democratic oversight and aspects of bureaucratic culture can mitigate the potential for future abuse of state building projects.
34586.zh_abstract: 我研究了促进发展的国家（能力）建设项目被用于镇压的可能性。我利用了统一后的德国中前普鲁士地区与前非普鲁士地区之间能力建设差异所形成的自然实验，以及纳粹政权激进的政策转变。跨越地理不连续性，以及同一东向运输线的不同收集点，我发现普鲁士市镇在驱逐德国犹太人方面效率显著更高。它们在提供公共产品和征税方面也表现更好。就在纳粹上台之前，普鲁士市镇在提供公共产品方面也更有效率，但并未表现出差异性的反犹主义。我表明，民主监督和官僚文化的某些方面可以减轻国家建设项目未来被滥用的可能性。
34586.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：H11, H41, N43, N44, P50

34585.title: Elections and Political Investment
34585.abstract: Elections select officeholders and policies, but they also signal to political actors where to invest their time and money. This paper presents a framework for understanding these effects, in which political investors (e.g., donors, activists) allocate resources where expected political fundamentals favor their party. Investors possess idiosyncratic local knowledge but also public information in the form of recent election results. These signals are complementary: where local knowledge is good, even the narrowest vote-share majorities can align beliefs and concentrate investment. I apply this framework to the changing political geography of the United States between 1940 and 1972, when urban and minority areas came into play for the Democratic Party. A regression discontinuity design based on close presidential elections shows that counties narrowly won by Democrats saw pronounced increases in Democratic local officeholding and voter support in subsequent election periods. This does not reflect direct impacts of presidential elections on local offices, but rather indirect shifts through political investment, including heightened activity in newspaper advertising, phone banking, and civil rights mobilization. Effects are concentrated in urban, Black, and union areas where dense organizational networks enhanced local political knowledge. Together, the findings show how elections organize political actors not only at the ballot box but through the information they convey.
34585.zh_abstract: 选举选出官员和政策，但它们也向政治行动者发出信号，指示他们应将时间和金钱投资于何处。本文提出了一个理解这些效应的框架，其中政治投资者（例如捐赠者、活动家）将资源分配到预期政治基本面有利于其政党的地区。投资者拥有独特的本地知识，但也拥有以近期选举结果形式存在的公共信息。这些信号是互补的：在本地知识良好的地方，即使是最微弱的得票率多数也能协调信念并集中投资。我将此框架应用于1940年至1972年间美国不断变化的政治地理格局，当时城市和少数族裔地区开始对民主党发挥作用。基于激烈总统选举的断点回归设计表明，民主党以微弱优势赢得的县在随后的选举周期中，其民主党地方官员任职率和选民支持率均显著增加。这并不反映总统选举对地方职位的直接影响，而是通过政治投资产生的间接转变，包括报纸广告、电话银行和民权动员活动的增加。这些效应集中在城市、黑人和工会地区，这些地区密集的组织网络增强了本地政治知识。总之，这些发现表明选举不仅通过投票箱，还通过其传达的信息来组织政治行动者。
34585.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：D72, J15, J18, N32, N42, P16

34584.title: Learning and the Emergence of Nonlinearity in Financial Markets
34584.zh_title: 学习与金融市场非线性的出现
34584.authors: Ian Dew-Becker, Stefano Giglio, Pooya Molavi
34584.abstract: Financial markets (and more generally the real economy) display a wide range of important nonlinearities. This paper focuses on stock returns, which are skewed
34584.zh_abstract: 金融市场（以及更广泛的实体经济）展现出多种重要的非线性特征。本文聚焦于股票收益，其分布是偏斜的。

34583.title: What Would it Cost to End Extreme Poverty?
34583.zh_title: 终结极端贫困需要多少成本？
34583.authors: Roshni Sahoo, Joshua Blumenstock, Paul Niehaus, Leo Selker, Stefan Wager
34583.abstract: We study poverty minimization via direct transfers, framing this as a statistical learning problem while retaining the information constraints faced by real-world programs. Using nationally representative household consumption surveys from 23 countries that together account for 50% of the world’s poor, we estimate that reducing the poverty rate to 1% (from a baseline of 12% at the time of last survey) would cost $\$170$B nominal per year. This is 5.5 times the corresponding reduction in the aggregate poverty gap, but only 19% of the cost of universal basic income. Extrapolated globally, the results correspond to a cost of (approximately) ending extreme poverty of roughly 0.3% of global GDP.
34583.zh_abstract: 我们通过直接转移支付研究贫困最小化问题，将其构建为一个统计学习问题，同时保留现实世界项目所面临的信息约束。利用来自23个国家的全国代表性家庭消费调查数据（这些国家合计占全球贫困人口的50%），我们估计，将贫困率降至1%（相对于最近一次调查时12%的基线水平）每年需要1700亿美元的名义成本。这是相应减少的总体贫困缺口总额的5.5倍，但仅为全民基本收入成本的19%。将结果外推至全球，这相当于（大致）终结极端贫困的成本约为全球GDP的0.3%。

34582.title: Agglomeration, Segregation and Imperial Origins
34582.authors: Ester Faia, Edward L. Glaeser, Saverio Simonelli, Martina Viarengo
34582.abstract: What explains the dramatic differences in earnings across locations? We employ an administrative employer-employee linked dataset from Italy that includes the country’s entire workforce to estimate firm-worker or location-worker effects. We also estimate differences in human capital accumulation across firms and cities. We find that the elasticity of the location premia to density is smaller than in other settings and that other locational characteristics, such as segregation in school or the workplace and inter-generational mobility, are more strongly correlated with earnings and earnings growth. Our place-based estimates are similar if we focus on movers who were forced to relocate after the L’Aquila Earthquake. Using a regression discontinuity design, we find that density levels jump up at the historic border between House of Savoy-ruled Piedmont and the Hapsburg Empire. Earnings today also jump at the border. This finding suggests that there may be some unintended effects of being a far-flung province of a distant empire, perhaps because of access to larger markets or the administrative and educational reforms that began under Empress Maria Theresa.
34582.zh_abstract: 是什么解释了不同地区之间收入的巨大差异？我们利用意大利包含全国所有劳动力的行政雇主-雇员关联数据，来估计企业-工人效应或地点-工人效应。我们还估算了不同企业和城市间人力资本积累的差异。我们发现，地点溢价对密度的弹性小于其他研究背景下的估计值，而其他地点特征，如学校或工作场所的隔离程度以及代际流动性，与收入及收入增长的相关性更强。如果我们聚焦于拉奎拉地震后被迫搬迁的迁移者，我们基于地点的估计结果相似。利用断点回归设计，我们发现，在萨伏伊王朝统治的皮埃蒙特与哈布斯堡帝国之间的历史边界处，密度水平出现跃升。如今的收入也在该边界处出现跃升。这一发现表明，作为一个遥远帝国的偏远省份可能会产生一些意想不到的效应，或许是因为能够进入更大的市场，或者是因为始于玛丽亚·特蕾莎女皇统治下的行政和教育改革。
34582.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J31, J61, N93, R10, R23

34581.title: Who Chooses and Who Benefits? The Design of Public School Choice Systems
34581.zh_title: 谁选择，谁受益？公立学校选择制度的设计
34581.authors: Christopher Campos, Jesse Bruhn, Eric Chyn, Antonia Vazquez
34581.abstract: Public school choice has evolved rapidly in the past two decades, as districts roll out new magnet, dual-language, and themed programs to broaden educational opportunity. We use newly collected national data to document that opt-in (voluntary) systems: (i) are the modal design; (ii) are harder to navigate; and (iii) have participation that is concentrated among more advantaged students. These facts suggest a striking inconsistency: districts have largely adopted centralized assignment algorithms to broaden access, but most rely on optional participation that fragments public education. We study the implications of this design choice in the Los Angeles Unified School District, the largest opt-in system in the country, combining nearly two decades of administrative data, randomized lotteries, and quasi-experimental expansions in access. Participation is highly selective, consistent with national evidence, and lottery estimates suggest that the students with the lowest demand for choice schools are the ones who gain the most from attending. Opt-in participation therefore embeds a selection mechanism that screens out high-return students and leaves many effective programs with unused capacity. To evaluate system-level implications, we estimate a structural model linking applications, enrollment, and achievement. Choice schools are vertically differentiated and generate meaningful gains, but the opt-in participation rule—through high application costs and negative selection on gains—prevents these benefits from reaching the students who need them most. Counterfactual simulations make the design stakes clear: information and travel-cost reductions have limited effects, whereas reforms that change the participation architecture eliminate core inefficiencies and deliver the largest district-wide achievement gains. These results underscore that system design— not school effectiveness alone—shapes who benefits from public school choice and to what extent.
34581.zh_abstract: 在过去的二十年里，公立学校选择迅速发展，学区纷纷推出新的磁石学校、双语学校和主题项目，以拓宽教育机会。我们利用新收集的全国性数据证明，自愿参与（非强制）系统：(i) 是主要的设计模式；(ii) 更难操作；(iii) 参与集中在更优势的学生群体中。这些事实表明一个显著的矛盾：学区在很大程度上采用了集中分配算法来扩大入学机会，但大多数依赖于将公共教育碎片化的自愿参与。我们研究了这一设计选择在洛杉矶联合学区（美国最大的自愿参与系统）中的影响，结合了近二十年的行政数据、随机抽签以及准实验性的入学机会扩展。参与具有高度选择性，这与全国性证据一致，抽签估计表明，对选择学校需求最低的学生恰恰是从入学中获益最多的群体。因此，自愿参与嵌入了一种筛选机制，该机制排除了高回报的学生，并导致许多有效项目出现闲置容量。为了评估系统层面的影响，我们估计了一个连接申请、入学和学业成就的结构模型。选择学校是垂直差异化的，并能产生有意义的收益，但自愿参与规则——通过高申请成本和对收益的负向选择——阻止了这些收益惠及最需要它们的学生。反事实模拟使设计的重要性变得清晰：信息和交通成本的降低效果有限，而改变参与架构的改革则消除了核心低效，并带来了最大的全区学业成就提升。这些结果强调，系统设计——而不仅仅是学校有效性本身——决定了谁从公立学校选择中受益以及受益的程度。

34580.title: Exporting, Wage Profiles, and Human Capital: Evidence from Brazil
34580.zh_title: 出口、工资曲线与人力资本：来自巴西的证据
34580.authors: Xiao Ma, Marc-Andreas Muendler, Alejandro Nakab
34580.abstract: Export activity shapes workers’ experience-wage profiles. Using employer-employee and customs data for Brazilian manufacturing, we document that workers' experience wage profiles are steeper at exporters than at non-exporters and, among exporters, steeper at exporters shipping to high-income destinations. We develop and quantify a model featuring worker-firm wage bargaining, export-market entry by multi-worker firms, and human capital accumulation by workers to interpret the data. Human capital growth can explain one-half of the differences in wage profiles between exporters and non-exporters. We show that increased human capital per worker can account for one-half of the overall gains in real income from trade openness.
34580.zh_abstract: 出口活动塑造了工人的经验-工资曲线。利用巴西制造业的雇主-雇员和海关数据，我们记录了工人的经验工资曲线在出口企业比非出口企业更陡峭，并且在出口企业中，向高收入目的地出口的企业其曲线更陡峭。我们开发并量化了一个模型，该模型包含工人-企业工资谈判、多工人企业的出口市场进入以及工人的人力资本积累，以解释这些数据。人力资本增长可以解释出口企业与非出口企业之间工资曲线差异的一半。我们表明，人均人力资本的增加可以解释贸易开放带来的实际收入总收益的一半。
34580.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：E24, F12, F14, F16, J24, J64

34588.title: Topography of the FX Derivatives Market: A View from London
34588.zh_title: 外汇衍生品市场的地形：来自伦敦的视角
34588.authors: Sinem Hacioglu Hoke, Daniel A. Ostry, Hélène Rey, Adrien Rousset Planat, Vania Stavrakeva, Jenny Tang
34588.abstract: Drawing on 100 million transactions, we show how speculators, hedgers, and market makers interact in the world’s largest FX derivatives market, and that derivatives trading can affect exchange rates. Firms in the largest client sectors—pension and investment funds, insurers, and nonfinancials—use FX derivatives primarily to hedge currency risk, with dealer banks providing the liquidity. Hedge funds, with comparatively smaller net exposures, trade speculatively, whereas dealer banks insulate themselves from changes in speculative demand by taking offsetting positions with hedgers, especially nonfinancials. Non-bank market makers, instead, take residual exchange-rate exposures “on the margin”. Hedge funds’ speculative flows help transmit monetary policy shocks to exchange rates, while investment funds' unwinding of hedges contribute to dollar appreciations when credit risk rises. Our results highlight that exchange rates depend on the composition of trading activities in FX derivatives markets.
34588.zh_abstract: 利用1亿笔交易，我们展示了投机者、对冲者和做市商如何在世界上最大的外汇衍生品市场中互动，以及衍生品交易如何影响汇率。最大的客户部门——养老基金和投资基金、保险公司和非金融企业——主要使用外汇衍生品来对冲货币风险，而交易商银行提供流动性。对冲基金的净敞口相对较小，进行投机性交易，而交易商银行通过与非金融企业等对冲者建立抵消头寸，使自己免受投机需求变化的影响。相反，非银行做市商“在边际上”承担剩余的外汇风险敞口。对冲基金的投机性流动有助于将货币政策冲击传导至汇率，而投资基金解除对冲则会在信用风险上升时导致美元升值。我们的结果强调，汇率取决于外汇衍生品市场交易活动的构成。
